Our communities should never be left defenseless - but the Trump administration doesn’t agree. Instead of protecting cities across the United States, they have instead attempted to cut vital funding needed to prevent, protect against, and respond to terrorist attacks and other

ICE shot and killed another person today, just days after Lorenzo Salgado Araujo was shot and killed in Houston. Neither was the target of an investigation.

This is not law enforcement - it’s inhumane, and it’s past time for ICE to be held accountable. My thoughts and prayers
